prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为5752→6096→5608→5326→5869，整体呈波动走势，近5年位次均值约5730名，2025年基准位次约5869名，较2024年（5326名）后 移约543名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年115人、2022年115人、2023年116人、2024年112人、2025年113人；2026年计划增至122人，较2025年扩 招约8%，扩招幅度明显，按供需弹性原理将推低位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名，近年排名稳定在第20 –22名区间，属于国内顶尖工科强校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，涉及PPT贬低其他专业、考试作弊回应争议等事件，可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音热 度总排名第66位，评价为一般，未出现高热关注；历史投档异常记录中未见天津大学断档信号；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达20个，其中化学工程与技术、 管理科学与工程为A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、建筑学、机械工程等为A或A-，工科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科热门专业社会热度持续偏高，与天津大学优势学科高度契合；湖北省物理类考生2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万，持续增长，2026 年总考生39.37万人，按近年比例估算物理类约25.1万人，较2025年小幅增加，竞争略有加剧；天津大学位于天津市，距湖北省 较远，属跨省报考；该校在湖北省招生规模较大（物理类超百人），属于在鄂招生较多的外省985高校，地域因素对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5869名 、2026年扩招约8%（推低位次数字增大）、湖北省物理类考生小幅增加（竞争略加剧）、学校声誉偏负面（轻微抑制热度）及工科优势学科吸引力强等多重因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约6180名，区间5680–6680名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5752 → 6096 → 5608 → 5326 → 5869, showing a fluctuating trend. The average ranking over the past 5 years is approximately 5730, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5869, which is 543 places lower than 2024 (5326). The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei was 115 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 112 in 2024, and 113 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 122, an expansion of about 8% compared to 2025, which, according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, will push the ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 20th, and has been stable in the 20th–22nd range in recent years, making it a top domestic engineering powerhouse. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving incidents such as PPT disparaging other majors and controversy over exam cheating responses, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 66th, rated as average, without high attention. No signs of a cutoff drop have been seen in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, and Mechanical Engineering as A or A-, demonstrating strong engineering strength that attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with Tianjin University's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is 393,700, with an estimated 251,000 in Physics Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, far from Hubei Province, making it a cross-province application. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hubei (over 100 for Physics Category), making it one of the out-of-province 985 universities with higher enrollment in Hubei, and the regional factor has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 5869, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8% (pushing the ranking number higher), a slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei (slightly intensified competition), a slightly negative university reputation (mildly suppressing enthusiasm), and the strong appeal of engineering advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 6180, with a range of 5680–6680.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 6180 is in the middle of the range 5680–6680. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Precision Instrument and Optoelectronics, Intelligent Manufacturing, Mathematics Innovation Class, New Medicine) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Future Technology College, Intelligence and Computing, Electrical and Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Ship and Ocean, Intelligent Water Conservancy, Earth System, Economics and Management) as safety options. When the ranking is better than the lower limit of 5680, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were 1930→2070 respectively. With only two years of data, the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 2070, shifting back by about 140 positions compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 4 students in 2024 and 4 students in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 6 students, a 50% expansion compared to 2025. This significant expansion, according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, will greatly push the ranking number downward (increase the rank value).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 20th in the Soft Science Ranking. It is a top-tier comprehensive university, also attractive to History Category examinees. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving incidents such as PPTs disparaging other majors, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal attention. Architecture (A), Urban and Rural Planning (A), and Landscape Architecture (A-) are directly related to History Category enrollment majors (Architecture, Social Science Experimental Class), with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors are socially recommended, while Architecture majors are in a wait-and-see phase. The number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province was 149,000 in 2021 → 141,000 in 2025, generally stable, with an estimated 143,000 in 2026, showing little change. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, involving cross-province application. The enrollment number for History Category is very small (4–6 students), a small-scale enrollment, so ranking fluctuations may be large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2070, a significant 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (greatly pushing the ranking number downward), a basically stable number of History Category examinees, a slightly negative university reputation (mildly suppressing enthusiasm), and the attractiveness of Architecture-related advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2671, with a range of 2366–2976.
